title: Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sonata Software Ventures Solutions:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software Ventures Solutions!
